meta.name: India Crop Season and Pest Advisory Knowledge Base
meta.purpose: Lookup support for crop advisory, pest advisory, and season-aware planning in a web app
meta.important_note: This is a curated knowledge base. Validate locally with district agriculture officers before production use.

season_definitions.kharif: Monsoon season crops, usually sown June-July and harvested around September-October.
season_definitions.rabi: Winter season crops, usually sown October-December and harvested around March-April.
season_definitions.zaid: Short summer season crops between rabi and kharif, usually March-June.

top_pests.symptoms: Dead hearts in vegetative stage; white ear heads later.
top_pests.first_response: Remove infested tillers, use pheromone traps, keep nitrogen balanced.

top_pests.symptoms: Leaves folded and scraped, reducing photosynthesis.
top_pests.first_response: Scout early; avoid excess nitrogen and encourage natural enemies.

top_pests.symptoms: Hopper burn patches, sooty mold, plant drying in clumps.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor closely and avoid indiscriminate insecticide use.

top_pests.symptoms: Curling leaves, sticky honeydew, poor grain fill.
top_pests.first_response: Regular scouting, avoid excess nitrogen, conserve beneficial insects.

top_pests.symptoms: Drying seedlings, hollow stems, patchy stand loss.
top_pests.first_response: Treat seed and ensure good soil moisture at sowing.

top_pests.symptoms: Night feeding, leaf chewing, sudden defoliation in patches.
top_pests.first_response: Deep ploughing before sowing and field monitoring.

wheat.basis: Common wheat pests in Indian extension advisories.

top_pests.symptoms: Whorl feeding, frass, shredded leaves, damaged cobs.
top_pests.first_response: Uniform sowing, pheromone traps, bird perches, frequent scouting.

top_pests.symptoms: Dead hearts and bore holes in stems.
top_pests.first_response: Destroy egg masses and damaged plants; use resistant hybrids.
Monitor early and keep nutrition balanced.

top_pests.symptoms: Leaf curling, honeydew, sticky lint, virus risk.
top_pests.first_response: Avoid excess pyrethroids, remove weeds, monitor early season populations.

top_pests.symptoms: Rosette flowers, damaged bolls, pink larvae inside bolls.
top_pests.first_response: Use pheromone traps and destroy infested bolls.

top_pests.symptoms: Leaf curling and yellowing, hopper-burn-like symptoms.
top_pests.first_response: Scout young crop regularly and avoid excessive nitrogen.

top_pests.symptoms: Clustering on shoots and flowers; stunted siliqua development.
top_pests.first_response: Early sowing and regular scouting.

top_pests.symptoms: Leaf skeletonization, especially in seedling stage.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor seedlings closely and destroy early infestations.

top_pests.symptoms: Sucking damage on developing pods and seeds.
top_pests.first_response: Field sanitation and local advisory-based control.

top_pests.symptoms: Dead hearts in young crop; weak tillering.
top_pests.first_response: Remove dead hearts, treat setts, maintain timely planting.

top_pests.symptoms: Drying of top leaves and damaged growing point.
top_pests.first_response: Detrashing and destruction of affected shoots.
Field sanitation and natural enemy conservation.
Avoid monoculture and remove infested plants.

top_pests.symptoms: Defoliation with looping larvae on leaves.
top_pests.first_response: Early monitoring and intercropping/biological control support.
Crop rotation, scout regularly, avoid unnecessary sprays.

top_pests.symptoms: Leaf curling and silvery patches; can reduce pegging.
top_pests.first_response: Timely sowing, border crops, scouting at seedling stage.
Monitor early and keep nutrition balanced.

top_pests.symptoms: Serpentine mines on leaves and premature defoliation.
top_pests.first_response: Use crop rotation and ETL-based intervention.
Use pheromone traps, bird perches, timely sowing.

top_pests.symptoms: Sap sucking on tender shoots and pods.
top_pests.first_response: Scout early and conserve beneficial insects.
Field sanitation and early stage monitoring.

top_pests.symptoms: Hole feeding in pods; grain damage.
top_pests.first_response: Pheromone traps and stage-wise monitoring.

top_pests.symptoms: Shriveled or unfilled seeds inside pods.
top_pests.first_response: Timely sowing and destruction of infested pods.
Monitor early and avoid excess nitrogen.
Scout at flowering and avoid excessive nitrogen.
Use pheromone traps and stage-wise scouting.
Proper tillage and residue management.
Early monitoring and manual removal in small plots.
Use light traps and scout field edges.

top_pests.symptoms: Stem damage and poor fiber quality.
top_pests.first_response: Sanitation and timely sowing.
Early sowing and uniform crop establishment.
Destroy damaged seedlings and use scouting.
Field scouting and early intervention.
Timely sowing and resistant varieties.
Scout and destroy infested plants.

top_pests.symptoms: Sap sucking and poor grain set.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor at heading stage and avoid excess nitrogen.
Early scouting and conservation of predators.
Seed treatment and moisture management.
Monitoring and field sanitation.

top_pests.symptoms: Mine galleries in leaves and tubers.
top_pests.first_response: Earthing up, store hygiene and pheromone traps.
Monitor vectors early and rogue infected plants.
Tillage and residue management.
Water stress avoidance and regular scouting.
Crop rotation and field sanitation.
Scout at dusk and use local recommendations.

top_pests.symptoms: Damaged flower head and seed loss.
top_pests.first_response: Remove infested heads and scout at flowering.
Balanced nutrition and field monitoring.
Early scouting and biological control support.
Regular scouting and removal of webbed parts.

top_pests.symptoms: Swollen stems and reduced capsule formation.
top_pests.first_response: Timely sowing and field sanitation.

top_pests.symptoms: Rolled leaves and reduced leaf area.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor early and use local IPM measures.

top_pests.symptoms: Tunneling in rhizome, weak plants, lodging.
top_pests.first_response: Clean planting material and field sanitation.

top_pests.symptoms: Bore holes in pseudostem, weakening of plant.
top_pests.first_response: Remove affected plant debris and monitor regularly.
Control vectors and use healthy suckers.

top_pests.symptoms: Damaged crown and V-shaped cuts on leaves.
top_pests.first_response: Sanitation of breeding sites and crown protection.

top_pests.symptoms: Wilting crown, holes with frass, internal trunk damage.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor palms and remove heavily infested trees.
Remove and destroy infested fronds.

top_pests.symptoms: Browning of tender shoots and deformed leaves.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor flushes and prune properly.
Maintain shade and humidity balance.
Scout at the first sign of feeding.

top_pests.symptoms: Bore holes in berries and bean loss.
top_pests.first_response: Timely picking and sanitation of fallen berries.
Shade management and removal of infested stems.

top_pests.symptoms: Mined leaf tissue and reduced photosynthesis.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor flushes and protect beneficial insects.

top_pests.symptoms: Sap sucking, sticky deposits and leaf yellowing.
top_pests.first_response: Prune heavily infested parts and conserve predators.

top_pests.symptoms: White cottony clusters on shoots and leaves.
top_pests.first_response: Field sanitation and targeted local control.
Soil sanitation and monitoring around tree basins.
Shade management and regular monitoring.
Collect and destroy infested capsules.
Remove infested shoots and maintain sanitation.
Remove affected shoots and keep planting material healthy.

top_pests.symptoms: Scales on rhizomes and storage issues.
top_pests.first_response: Use clean rhizomes and field sanitation.
Crop rotation and healthy seed rhizomes.
Remove affected shoots and maintain field cleanliness.

top_pests.symptoms: Rhizome feeding and poor storage quality.
top_pests.first_response: Use disease-free seed rhizomes and proper curing.

top_pests.symptoms: Rolled leaves and reduced leaf area.
top_pests.first_response: Monitor early and use local IPM advice.

top_pests.first_response: Monitor flowering flush and use sanitation.

top_pests.first_response: Remove infested trees and protect trunks.

top_pests.symptoms: Sooty mold, yellowing and virus spread.
top_pests.first_response: Use insect screens in nursery and monitor with traps.
